dashboard.label: NeuralWatch — EU AI Act Compliance
dashboard.description: Module D: EU AI Act compliance tracking across Articles 9, 13, 14, 17, and 72.

search.query: | inputlookup neuralwatch_compliance_baseline.csv | stats sum(eval(if(disclosure_enabled=1 AND human_review_required=0,1,0))) as compliant_count
index=neuralwatch_injections sourcetype="nw:prompt" injection_score>0.65 | stats count as incidents
| inputlookup neuralwatch_compliance_baseline.csv | stats dc(service) as total_services

| inputlookup neuralwatch_compliance_baseline.csv | join type=left service [search index=neuralwatch_ai_calls earliest=-24h | stats count as total_calls, sum(eval(if(status="error",1,0))) as errors by service] | join type=left service [search index=neuralwatch_injections earliest=-24h | stats sum(eval(if(injection_score>0.65,1,0))) as injection_events by service] | eval art9_score=if(isnull(injection_events) OR injection_events<5, 100, max(0,100-injection_events*5)) | eval art13_score=if(disclosure_enabled=1,100,0) | eval art14_score=if(human_review_required=0,100,round(human_review_threshold*100,0)) | eval art17_score=if(isnull(errors) OR isnull(total_calls) OR total_calls=0,100,round((1-errors/total_calls)*100,0)) | eval art72_score=90 | eval overall_score=round((art9_score+art13_score+art14_score+art17_score+art72_score)/5,1) | eval status=case(overall_score>=90,"✅ COMPLIANT",overall_score>=70,"⚠️ AT RISK",1=1,"❌ NON-COMPLIANT") | table service, status, overall_score, art9_score, art13_score, art14_score, art17_score, art72_score | sort -overall_score

chart.title: Article 9 — Risk Management Score by Service

search.query: | inputlookup neuralwatch_compliance_baseline.csv | join type=left service [search index=neuralwatch_injections earliest=-24h | stats sum(eval(if(injection_score>0.65,1,0))) as injection_events by service] | eval art9_score=if(isnull(injection_events) OR injection_events<5, 100, max(0,100-injection_events*5)) | table service, art9_score | sort -art9_score

| inputlookup neuralwatch_compliance_baseline.csv | eval status=case(disclosure_enabled=1 AND human_review_required=0, "Fully Compliant", disclosure_enabled=1, "Disclosure Only", 1=1, "Non-Compliant") | stats count by status

chart.title: Article 17 — Quality Management: Error Rate by Service (%)

search.query: index=neuralwatch_ai_calls sourcetype="nw:ai_call" | stats count as total_calls, sum(eval(if(status="error",1,0))) as errors by service | eval error_rate=round(errors/total_calls*100,2) | sort -error_rate | fields service, error_rate

chart.title: Article 72 — Systemic Risk: Latency Drift by Model

search.query: index=neuralwatch_ai_calls sourcetype="nw:ai_call" | stats p50(latency_ms) as p50, p95(latency_ms) as p95 by model | sort -p95
